overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a western-themed video game showing two characters traveling at night through a rocky forested area. One character rides a horse while another walks ahead carrying a lantern, eventually passing a campsite with a fire before continuing onto rocky mountain terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest trail between large boulders

agents.ego_description: riding a horse following a companion who walks ahead carrying a lantern to illuminate the path

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on foot carrying a lantern to light the way through the dark trail

large gray boulder formation lining the right side of the trail
tall pine trees scattered throughout the forest canopy
narrow dirt path winding through the rocky terrain

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a nighttime journey through a narrow forest trail flanked by large rock formations. The player character rides a horse following an NPC companion who carries a lantern. The path is surrounded by pine trees and boulders, with limited visibility beyond the lantern's glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: campsite with active fire under rock overhang

events.description: campsite fire becomes visible ahead, casting orange glow and smoke
passing the campfire and exiting the immediate campsite area

agents.ego_description: riding horse through the campsite, navigating around the fire and camp debris

notable_agents.action: walking through the campsite carrying a lantern past the fire

entered.detail: active campfire with flames and glowing embers under a rock overhang
large rock formation providing shelter over the campsite
smoke rising from the campfire into the night air
scattered camping supplies and equipment around the site

segments.scene_description: The characters approach and pass through a campsite nestled under a rock overhang. The campfire provides the primary light source, casting flickering orange illumination and smoke. The trail leads directly past the fire and scattered camp equipment before continuing beyond the shelter of the overhang.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail ascending through boulders

events.description: terrain transitions from dirt to rocky gravel path as the trail ascends
path narrows and becomes steeper with larger rock formations on the right

agents.ego_description: riding horse up the rocky incline, following the companion through increasingly rugged terrain

notable_agents.action: navigating the steep rocky path on foot with lantern

entered.detail: steep rocky trail with loose gravel and stone steps
massive light-colored boulder formation on the right side of the path
dark valley visible in the distance below the ascending trail

segments.scene_description: Leaving the campsite behind, the trail becomes a steep, rocky mountain path with loose gravel and large boulders. The characters ascend the incline with the lantern illuminating the rugged terrain, while the dark valley becomes visible in the distance below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a dark, forested trail that gradually ascends into a rugged mountain landscape. It begins with a camera tracking a rider and a lantern-bearing companion through a narrow path flanked by towering pine trees and massive rock formations. As the characters move forward, the scene shifts into a sheltered campsite under a rock overhang, where the dim lantern light is momentarily replaced by the flickering orange glow and smoke of a campfire. The trail then leads away from the camp and opens up into a steep incline of loose gravel and boulders. Finally, the camera follows the ascent up the rocky mountain path, revealing a dark, expansive valley stretching out in the distance below.
